缺点1，系统存在感过低，感觉没什么用，没系统感觉混的也不会比现在差。
缺点1，主角实力零提升，开局第一次修炼后达到一定的实力，之后经历几个事件，实力都没动，就像修炼了一次后，几个月都不修炼一样。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1663292621,"group_id":"7122847850018376707","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nx90N/bQxblouzUH25JaBPWPNbQlFx921il6E1uSARcd","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/ad69fdeabcbb47678bbb53e9b75b4379~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776796157&x-signature=%2BY%2FfAzK695IPtv7eqP5D2HLmXCA%3D","user_id":"2762445262957067","user_name":"亦无味"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2762445262957067","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1705119477,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7122847850018376707","book_info":{"abstract":"穿越九叔世界，拜师千鹤道长。
